changeSet.author: MohamedFouad
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS cost_centers ( id Integer not null, created_by character varying(255) , created_date timestamp(6) without time zone NOT NULL, last_modified_by character varying(255) , last_modified_date timestamp(6) without time zone, deleted_by character varying(255) , deleted_date timestamp(6) without time zone, is_delete boolean DEFAULT false, serial_id VARCHAR(50) UNIQUE NOT NULL, code VARCHAR(50) , name VARCHAR(50) UNIQUE NOT NULL, description VARCHAR(100), department_id Integer, CONSTRAINT app_cost_centers_p_key PRIMARY KEY (id) );
CREATE SEQUENCE IF NOT EXISTS cost_center_id_seq INCREMENT 1 START 1 MINVALUE 1 CACHE 1 OWNED BY cost_centers.id;
